victim.value: Previous family's son who committed suicide in the house
victim.quote: their son had committed suicide. That was five years ago.

closed_world.value: The haunted Sands house and small unmapped town
closed_world.quote: stupid small town that isn't even on a single map

investigator.value: Mia, the teenage protagonist experiencing supernatural events
investigator.quote: Mr. Bee? Do you know a boy named Lucas? I don't know his last name, but he's about my age.

red_herring.value: Supernatural haunting used to mask or distract from human agency - ghost boy Lucas appears to guide rather than threaten
red_herring.quote: I believe what other peope say about it being haunted and everything.

social_world.value: Small town secrecy and institutional knowledge - teacher knows house history that family doesn't, community keeps secrets
social_world.quote: the family wanted it to be kept a secret and that you can come and talk to me anytime

media_and_audience.value: Local folklore and reputation management - haunted house stories circulate while official narrative suppressed
media_and_audience.quote: I believe what other peope say about it being haunted

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist's displacement and loss of stability - forced move, separated from boyfriend, questioning fundamental reality
investigator_wound.quote: She wasn't even sure if Humans existed.
